name: ai-perform:wear-item:vapor-suit

name: ai-perform:turn-on-robot:automated-sweeper-bot
ai-refuse:open-furniture:hibernation-pods
perform: return lib.result("{!" + "The sealed pods are locked tight, their control surfaces displaying a steady amber light that indicates 'Deep Stasis Cycle - External Override Required'. You can see the faint, rhythmic pulse of life support through the frosted glass, but there is no manual latch to be found." + "!}");

name: ai-refuse:break-furniture:hibernation-pods
perform: return lib.result("{!" + "The hibernation pods are constructed from high-impact polymer and reinforced with internal bracing to protect the occupants during centuries of travel. You could strike them until your knuckles bleed, but you'd sooner break your hands than the reinforced casings." + "!}");

name: ai-perform:lick-furniture:hibernation-pods
ai-refuse:pee-furniture:hibernation-pods
perform: return lib.result("{!" + "The hibernation pods are sterile medical equipment protected by a faint, pressurized field of ionized air; any attempt to defile them is met with a sharp, static shock that discourages further experimentation." + "!}");

name: ai-perform:turn-on-npc:sweeper
ai-perform:w-intransitive
perform: var exits = lib.contents(room.id).filter(function(e) { return e.tags.has('exit') && e.properties.direction === 'west'; }); if (exits.length === 0) { return lib.result('You cannot go west from here.'); } var exit = exits[0]; if (!exit.properties.destination) { return lib.result('The way west appears to be blocked or leads nowhere.'); } if (exit.tags.has('openable') && !exit.properties.open) { return lib.result('The ' + lib.ref(exit) + ' is closed.'); } var moveEvent = lib.moveEvent(player.id, { to: exit.properties.destination, from: room.id, description: 'Player moved west' }); var visitEvent = lib.incrementVisits(); return { output: 'You head west.\n\n' + lib.describeRoom().output, events: [moveEvent, visitEvent] };

name: ai-perform:eat-item:pulsing-pith-fruit
ai-perform:unlock-exit:engineering-access-c:south
ai-perform:use-device:maintenance-terminal-c
perform: if (!object.properties.switchedOn) { return lib.result("The terminal screen is dark. You might need to turn it on first."); } var output = "The thick polycarbonate screen flickers with a sickly green amber glow. You tap at the chunky, grease-stained keys, which clack with a satisfyingly heavy mechanical weight.\n\n"; if (object.properties.systemStatus === 'degraded') { output += "The interface is a mess of overlapping diagnostic windows. One log entry stands out, dated centuries ago: 'Sector 4 bypass complete. If the eyes fail, follow the Golden Path. The Machine-Spirit is blind, but the floor remembers.'"; } else { output += "The system appears to be functioning within normal parameters, though the interface feels ancient and layered with strange custom subroutines."; } return lib.result(output);

name: ai-perform:clean-device:harmonic-scrubber
perform: if (!object.properties.switchedOn) { return lib.result("The obsidian sphere is silent and cold; it needs to be powered on to function."); } if (!indirect) { return lib.result("You run the vibrating sphere over your skin. The harmonic frequencies tingle pleasantly, shaking loose every speck of dust and leaving you feeling unnaturally clean."); } if (indirect.id === 'room:1' || indirect.tags.has('fixed')) { return lib.result("You apply the scrubber to " + lib.ref(indirect) + ". The porous obsidian hums against the surface, its ultrasonic vibrations shaking free centuries of micro-debris."); } return lib.result("You use the harmonic scrubber on " + lib.ref(indirect) + ". The high-frequency vibrations polish the surface to a dull, clean sheen.");

name: ai-perform:use-portable:tarnished-pitch-pipe
